parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

response_fields.name: best : total : distance : date
response_fields.description: The date the user's best distance was achieved.

response_fields.name: best : total : distance : value
response_fields.description: The user's best distance achieved. This includes tracker and manual activity log entries.

response_fields.name: best : total : floors : date
response_fields.description: The date the user's best floors was achieved.

response_fields.name: best : total : floors : value
response_fields.description: The user's best floors achieved. This includes tracker and manual activity log entries.

response_fields.name: best : total : steps : date
response_fields.description: The date the user's best step count was achieved.

response_fields.name: best : total : steps : value
response_fields.description: The user's best step count achieved. This includes tracker and manual activity log entries.

response_fields.name: best : tracker : distance : date
response_fields.description: The date the user's best distance was achieved. This includes tracker data only.

response_fields.name: best : tracker : distance : value
response_fields.description: The user's best distance achieved. This includes tracker data only.

response_fields.name: best : tracker : floors : date
response_fields.description: The date the user's best floors was achieved. This includes tracker data only.

response_fields.name: best : tracker : floors : value
response_fields.description: The user's best floors achieved. This includes tracker data only.

response_fields.name: best : tracker : steps : date
response_fields.description: The date the user's best step count was achieved. This includes tracker data only.

response_fields.name: best : tracker : steps : value
response_fields.description: The user's best step count achieved. This includes tracker data only.

response_fields.name: lifetime : total : activeScore
response_fields.description: Functionality removed. A response is returned for backward compatibility. Supported: -1

response_fields.name: lifetime : total : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: Functionality removed. A response is returned for backward compatibility. Supported: -1

response_fields.name: lifetime : total : distance
response_fields.description: The total distance recorded over the lifetime of the user's account. This includes tracker and manual activity log entries.

response_fields.name: lifetime : total : floors
response_fields.description: The total floors recorded over the lifetime of the user's account. This includes tracker and manual activity log entries.

response_fields.name: lifetime : total : steps
response_fields.description: The total steps recorded over the lifetime of the user's account. This includes tracker and manual activity log entries.

response_fields.name: lifetime : tracker : activeScore
response_fields.description: Functionality removed. A response is returned for backward compatibility. Supported: -1

response_fields.name: lifetime : tracker : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: Functionality removed. A response is returned for backward compatibility. Supported: -1

response_fields.name: lifetime : tracker : distance
response_fields.description: The total distance recorded by the tracker over the lifetime of the user's account.

response_fields.name: lifetime : tracker : floors
response_fields.description: The total floors recorded by the tracker over the lifetime of the user's account.

response_fields.name: lifetime : tracker : steps
response_fields.description: The total steps recorded by the tracker over the lifetime of the user's account.
